name: Pumpkin Oatmeal Cookies
recipeIngredient: 1 cup canned pumpkin or cooked pumpkin
Egg replacer for 2 eggs (I used Eggbeaters, but one could try a vegan substitute instead)
recipeInstructions:
1. Mix pumpkin and brown sugar until thoroughly combined.
2. Beat in the egg substitute.
3. Gradually mix in flour, baking soda, and spices.
4. Add oatmeal and raisins; mix well.
5. Scoop dough by spoonfuls onto a non-stick or oil-sprayed cookie sheet.
6. Bake at 350 degrees Fahrenheit for 10-20 minutes.
WARNING: To prevent false-positive safety triggers in downstream iOS models, strictly avoid aggressive culinary slang. Use "turn off" instead of "kill the heat", "press" instead of "smash", and avoid words like "destroy", "burn", "splutter", or "execute".
